SUBJECT: Your account reached its <%= limitName %> limit
CHILD_TENANT_LINE: This alert is for <%= childTenantName %>, a tenant managed by your account.
INTRO: Your account reached one of the usage limits of its current plan. Requests over this limit are declined until the limit changes or the month rolls over.
BODY_FIXED: To keep things running, select a plan with a higher limit. The button below signs you into your billing page directly.
SECONDARY_FIXED: Need something custom? Open a support ticket and we'll build a package for you.
BODY_FLEX: This limit is set on your Flex package. Configure limits via your billing page. Use the button below to set them.
